profile.name: Rony Wisnu Wardana
profile.role: Full Stack Software Engineer / QA Automation Engineer
profile.headline: Open to Work
profile.bio: 8+ years of experience building and maintaining scalable web applications, automation systems, and production infrastructure. Skilled in Laravel, Vue.js, Nuxt.js, TypeScript, and Node.js, with a focus on performance, system reliability, security, and long-term maintainability.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Delivered custom full-stack web solutions for clients, including backend development, frontend implementation, API integrations, database design, deployment, and ongoing support.
highlights: Built a PoS app for a restaurant with self-service order
Maintained client websites, ensuring high availability, reliability, and optimal performance.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Designed and built SIMETRI's e-commerce platform from the ground up as the sole engineer, covering system architecture, backend development, frontend development, database design, third-party integrations, security, testing, and deployment.
highlights: Built SIMETRI's e-commerce platform from scratch using modern full-stack technologies
Developed RESTful APIs and responsive frontend applications.
Designed and optimized database architecture for performance and scalability.
Integrated third-party services including payment gateways, shipping providers, and analytics platforms.
Implemented authentication, security best practices, and deployment automation.
Collaborated in agile development workflows to deliver production-ready features.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Full Stack Developer responsible for developing and maintaining Coltura.id using Laravel 12 and Nuxt 3, integrating third-party payment and logistics services, and optimizing application infrastructure with MariaDB, Redis, and Nginx.
highlights: Developed and launched Coltura.id using Laravel 12 and Nuxt 3, delivering a modern and scalable e-commerce platform.
Designed and integrated RESTful APIs with payment and shipping providers to support end-to-end business operations.
Implemented and maintained supporting infrastructure using MariaDB, Redis, and Nginx to ensure performance and reliability.
Collaborated with stakeholders to translate business requirements into production-ready features.

experience.title: QA Automation Engineer
experience.description: QA Automation Engineer with experience building Selenium-based automation frameworks, implementing E2E/UI/API testing, integrating tests into CI/CD pipelines, and driving software quality through collaboration, defect analysis, and process improvements.
highlights: Built and maintained automated test suites using Selenium WebDriver and TypeScript, improving test coverage and regression testing efficiency.
Implemented end-to-end, UI, and API automation testing for critical business workflows.
Integrated automated testing into CI/CD pipelines, enabling faster feedback and more reliable releases.
Collaborated closely with product managers, developers, and designers to ensure product quality throughout the development lifecycle.
Enhanced automation framework scalability, maintainability, and performance through code reviews and continuous improvements.
Identified, tracked, and validated defect resolutions, contributing to overall software stability and quality.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Led the end-to-end development of a scalable e-commerce platform, from system architecture and implementation to deployment and infrastructure management, while integrating multiple third-party services to support business operations.
highlights: Built Tokowendigg.com from scratch using Laravel 8 (backend) and Vue.js 2 (frontend), delivering a full-featured and scalable e-commerce platform

Integrated multiple third-party services and APIs, including Digiflazz.com, Moota.co, Cekmutasi.co.id, Bangjeff.com, Gamepoint.club, and VIP-Reseller.co.id for seamless product, transaction, and financial data flow
Set up and maintained the server infrastructure using Ubuntu 20.04 and aaPanel, ensuring system stability, performance, and security

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Full Stack Developer with 6+ years of experience in web development, backend architecture, infrastructure, and security. Successfully handled critical security incidents, mitigated large-scale DDoS attacks, and contributed to the recovery of production systems serving financial technology operations.
highlights: 6+ years developing and maintaining scalable web applications using Laravel, Vue.js, and Nuxt.js
Designed and integrated RESTful APIs with banking systems, payment gateways, SMS gateways, and e-KYC providers.
Improved application performance through database optimization, indexing, and query tuning.
Managed Linux server infrastructure, security hardening, Cloudflare, DDoS protection, and load balancing.
Built process automation solutions using Selenium (Python) and Puppeteer (Node.js).
Developed financial audit and reconciliation systems to ensure transaction accuracy and operational integrity.
Created reusable internal libraries and tools that improved development efficiency and system scalability.
Investigated and resolved a critical security incident affecting multiple users, helping prevent potential financial losses worth billions of rupiah.
Mitigated a large-scale DDoS attack involving millions of requests per second, restoring system stability and service availability.
Contributed to the recovery of a compromised production database following a security breach, ensuring data integrity and business continuity.

projects.title: SIMETRI
projects.description: Designed and developed a full-stack e-commerce platform from scratch, providing secure payment processing, shipping integrations, and scalable infrastructure for online business operations.

projects.title: COLTURA
projects.description: Built a modern e-commerce solution using Laravel and Nuxt, integrating third-party payment and logistics services to automate order fulfillment and improve operational efficiency.

projects.title: TriPay Payment
projects.description: Developed and maintained payment infrastructure, transaction auditing systems, and third-party integrations to support secure and reliable financial transactions at scale.

projects.title: P-Store.Net
projects.description: Developed a scalable digital marketplace with payment integrations, automated order processing, inventory management, and digital product delivery infrastructure.

projects.title: TriPay PPOB
projects.description: Built and enhanced core features of a PPOB platform that streamlines bill payments and digital product purchases through secure integrations with banks, payment gateways, and service providers.

projects.title: Cekmutasi (Archived)
projects.description: A bank transaction monitoring platform that automates payment verification using unique payment amounts, enabling businesses to confirm bank transfers without manual reconciliation.

projects.title: Tokowendigg
projects.description: A digital marketplace that enables users to purchase game credits and vouchers with secure payments, automated fulfillment, and real-time delivery through third-party service integrations.
